H2: Crack and Peel Sticker FAQs ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Crack and Peel Stickers

Premium Die-Cut Stickers with Easy Back-Slit Removal

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Select Your Crack and Peel Size and Quantity Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Crack and Peel Stickers for Business & Personal Use

Our custom crack and peel stickers feature a unique back-slit design that makes individual sticker removal incredibly easy. These die-cut vinyl stickers are perfect for promotional campaigns, product labeling, branding initiatives, and personal projects that require professional-quality adhesive graphics. See also [save the date magnets](https://www.decals.com/save-the-date-magnets).

Each crack and peel sticker is precision die-cut to your exact design specifications, ensuring clean edges and professional appearance. The innovative back-slit technology allows you to peel individual stickers from sheets without damaging surrounding graphics, making them ideal for high-volume applications and retail environments.

Available in multiple sizes and featuring vibrant full-color printing, these durable vinyl stickers maintain their adhesive strength and color integrity across indoor and outdoor applications. Whether you need branded stickers for marketing, product identification labels, or custom graphics for equipment marking, our crack and peel stickers deliver consistent performance and professional results.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

How to Order Your Crack and Peel Stickers

Ordering custom crack and peel stickers is straightforward with our streamlined design and approval process. Choose between our online design tool for simple graphics or upload your own professional artwork files for complex designs.

Design Process

Start by selecting your preferred sticker size and quantity from our configurator. Use our online designer to create your crack and peel graphics by uploading logos, adding text, or selecting from our clipart library. For professional results, upload vector-based EPS or PDF files that ensure crisp printing quality. Our system accepts files up to 100MB and provides real-time design previews.

After completing your design, add the crack and peel stickers to your cart and proceed to checkout. Our prepress team reviews every order to ensure optimal print quality and proper die-cut specifications for the back-slit functionality.

Payment

All crack and peel sticker orders require full payment before production begins. We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit cards for immediate processing. Check payments are also accepted but must be received and cleared before your stickers enter the production queue.

Live Order Tracking

Once your order is placed, you'll receive a unique Live Order Tracking number via email. This proprietary system allows you to monitor your crack and peel stickers through every production stage, from file processing and printing to quality inspection and shipping preparation. Access real-time updates by clicking the tracking link in your confirmation email.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Crack and Peel Production & Turnaround Times

Our flexible production schedule accommodates urgent deadlines and standard timelines for crack and peel sticker orders. Production time begins after file approval and payment confirmation, with turnaround options ranging from priority same-day processing to cost-effective extended scheduling.

All crack and peel stickers undergo precision die-cutting to create the signature back-slit that enables easy individual removal. This specialized cutting process is included in our standard production timelines regardless of your chosen turnaround speed.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Priority production delivers your crack and peel stickers within one business day of approval. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin processing the following business day. Emergency same-day processing may be available for critical deadlines—contact our customer service team to discuss expedited options for your specific requirements.

2 Business Days Express Production

Express production provides a balance of speed and value for crack and peel orders requiring quick turnaround. Your stickers complete the full production cycle within two business days of approval. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST start production the next business day, with emergency rush options available through customer service coordination.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Standard production is our most popular option, offering fast turnaround at no additional cost. This three-business-day timeline accommodates most project schedules while maintaining our quality standards for die-cutting and back-slit precision. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin processing the following business day.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Saver production provides cost savings for crack and peel orders with flexible deadlines. This five-business-day option reduces your total cost while delivering the same quality standards and die-cut precision as faster turnaround options. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST start production the next business day.

Important: Production time is separate from shipping time. Total delivery time includes both production duration and selected shipping method transit time. Turnaround begins when file upload is complete and approved, or when proof approval is received if requested.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Die-Cut Options for Crack and Peel Stickers

Crack and peel stickers are exclusively produced using die-cut methods that cut completely through both the vinyl material and paper backing. This cutting approach creates individually separated stickers while maintaining the signature back-slit that enables easy removal from sheets.

Die-Cut Crack and Peel Stickers

Die-cutting follows your design's exact contours, creating custom-shaped crack and peel stickers with no excess material around the edges. This "cookie cutter" approach produces individually cut stickers that separate cleanly from sheets while maintaining the back-slit functionality that defines crack and peel products.

Each die-cut sticker features precision edges that match your artwork specifications, whether you need simple geometric shapes, complex logos, or detailed graphics. The die-cutting process ensures consistent dimensions across large quantities while preserving the easy-peel backing system.

Material Options: Back-slit crack and peel functionality is available exclusively on our Standard and Permanent adhesive vinyl materials. These materials provide optimal adhesion strength while supporting the specialized cutting required for the easy-removal backing system.

The combination of die-cutting and back-slit technology makes these stickers ideal for applications requiring individual removal from sheets, such as promotional handouts, product labeling, inventory marking, and retail distribution scenarios where ease of use is essential.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Crack and Peel Artwork Requirements & File Specifications

Proper artwork preparation ensures optimal print quality and accurate die-cutting for your crack and peel stickers. Our production process accommodates both vector and raster graphics, with specific requirements for each file type to achieve professional results.

Preferred File Types

Vector-based files deliver superior quality for crack and peel printing and die-cutting precision. Submit Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated PostScript) or PDF files for best results. Maximum file size is 100MB. Convert all fonts to outlines or curves before submission to prevent font substitution during processing.

Additional File Formats

High-resolution raster files are acceptable for photographic or complex imagery in crack and peel designs. Accepted formats include JPG, TIFF, and PNG files. Follow our resolution guidelines based on your final output size: 100% scale requires 100 DPI minimum, 50% scale needs 200 DPI or higher, 25% scale requires 300 DPI or higher, and 10% scale needs 600-1200 DPI for optimal results.

File Setup Guidelines

Set up artwork proportionate to your exact crack and peel sticker dimensions. Clearly indicate cut lines for die-cutting accuracy—this is critical for achieving proper back-slit functionality. Convert all text elements to outlines to prevent font-related issues. Include bleed only when necessary for your specific design requirements. Never flatten or merge layers in PSD files, as our prepress team may need to adjust individual elements.

Design Services

Professional vectorizing and design recreation services are available if you cannot provide print-ready artwork. Most logos and simple graphics can be recreated for $15, while complex images may require custom quoting. Contact our sales team for detailed pricing on design services. Payment for design work is required before file recreation begins.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Crack and Peel Shipping & Delivery Information

Shipping time is separate from production time for all crack and peel sticker orders. Your total delivery timeframe includes both the selected production turnaround and chosen shipping method transit duration.

Shipping Methods

Standard ground shipping provides cost-effective delivery for most crack and peel orders within the continental United States. Express shipping options include expedited ground and overnight delivery for time-sensitive projects. International shipping is available to most destinations worldwide, with transit times varying by location and customs processing requirements.

Shipping Time Expectations

Ground shipping typically requires 3-7 business days after your crack and peel stickers leave our facility. Expedited options reduce transit time to 1-3 business days depending on destination and service level selected. International shipments may require additional time for customs clearance and local delivery processing.

Important Shipping Notes

Economy shipping options may have extended transit times and limited tracking capabilities compared to standard ground service. Rural and remote addresses may require additional delivery time regardless of selected shipping method. All crack and peel orders include tracking information when shipped, allowing you to monitor delivery progress from our facility to your destination.

Weather conditions, carrier delays, and peak shipping seasons may affect actual delivery times beyond our control. Contact our customer service team if you have specific delivery requirements or concerns about shipping to your location.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

How to Apply Crack and Peel Stickers

Proper installation technique ensures maximum adhesion and longevity for your crack and peel stickers. The unique back-slit design makes individual sticker removal simple while maintaining strong adhesive performance on approved surfaces.

Preparing the Surface

Clean the application surface thoroughly with isopropyl alcohol or mild detergent to remove dirt, oils, and residue that could interfere with adhesion. Allow the surface to dry completely before applying crack and peel stickers. Smooth, non-porous surfaces like glass, metal, and painted surfaces provide optimal adhesion for long-term performance.

Removing Individual Stickers

The back-slit design allows you to easily separate individual crack and peel stickers from sheets without damaging surrounding graphics. Locate the slit on the backing paper and gently separate the desired sticker from the sheet. This process eliminates the need to cut or tear stickers apart, ensuring clean edges and professional appearance.

Applying the Sticker

Remove the backing paper from your crack and peel sticker and position it carefully on the prepared surface. Start from one edge and gradually smooth the sticker down, working out any air bubbles with a squeegee or credit card. Apply firm, even pressure across the entire sticker to ensure complete adhesion. For best results, avoid repositioning the sticker after initial contact with the surface.

Allow 24-48 hours for the adhesive to fully cure before exposing crack and peel stickers to moisture, extreme temperatures, or mechanical stress. This curing period ensures maximum bond strength and long-term durability in your intended application environment.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Crack and Peel Stickers?

Crack and peel stickers are die-cut vinyl graphics featuring a specialized back-slit cutting technique that allows individual stickers to be easily separated from sheets without tools or tearing. The backing paper is precision-cut between each sticker, creating natural separation points that enable clean, effortless removal while maintaining the integrity of remaining stickers on the sheet.

These stickers are manufactured using durable vinyl materials with permanent or standard adhesive options, making them suitable for both indoor and outdoor applications. The die-cutting process creates custom shapes that follow your design contours exactly, while the crack and peel functionality adds convenience for high-volume applications, retail environments, and situations where individual sticker distribution is required.

Design Your Custom Crack and Peel Stickers Today

Ready to create professional crack and peel stickers for your business or personal project? Our online design system makes it easy to upload artwork, select sizes, and configure your order specifications. With production times as fast as one business day and our Live Order Tracking system, you'll have complete visibility throughout the entire process.

Start designing your crack and peel stickers now using our online configurator, or explore our custom hard hat stickers for specialized industrial applications. For questions about artwork requirements, material options, or bulk pricing, contact our customer service team at 320-391-5250.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Crack and Peel Sticker FAQs

What makes crack and peel stickers different from regular stickers?

Crack and peel stickers feature a specialized back-slit cutting technique that creates natural separation points between individual stickers on sheets. This allows you to easily remove individual stickers without tools, cutting, or damaging surrounding graphics, unlike regular sticker sheets that require manual separation or cutting.

What surfaces work best for crack and peel stickers?

Crack and peel stickers adhere best to smooth, clean, non-porous surfaces such as glass, metal, painted surfaces, and high-quality plastics. These surfaces provide optimal adhesion for both indoor and outdoor applications, ensuring long-term durability and performance.

Are crack and peel stickers waterproof?

Yes, crack and peel stickers are printed on waterproof vinyl materials that resist moisture, rain, and humidity. The vinyl construction and adhesive system maintain integrity in outdoor environments, making them suitable for exterior applications on vehicles, equipment, and signage.

How long do crack and peel stickers last outdoors?

Crack and peel stickers typically last 3-5 years in outdoor environments when applied to appropriate surfaces. Longevity depends on factors such as UV exposure, weather conditions, surface preparation, and installation quality. Indoor applications generally last longer due to reduced environmental stress.

What file format should I use for crack and peel artwork?

Adobe Illustrator EPS or PDF vector files provide the best results for crack and peel printing and die-cutting accuracy. High-resolution JPG, TIFF, or PNG files are also acceptable. Ensure all fonts are converted to outlines and clearly indicate cut lines for proper die-cutting and back-slit functionality.

Can I order crack and peel stickers in custom shapes?

Yes, crack and peel stickers are die-cut to match your exact design shape and contours. Whether you need simple geometric shapes, complex logos, or detailed custom graphics, our die-cutting process creates precise edges while maintaining the back-slit separation functionality that defines crack and peel products.

What is the minimum order quantity for crack and peel stickers?

Minimum order quantities vary by size and specifications, but we accommodate both small personal orders and large commercial quantities. Use our online configurator to see available quantity options for your specific size requirements, or contact customer service for volume pricing on larger orders.
